diagram_title: 行動版 Session Restructure — Functional Decomposition (simplified, 無 diff viewer)

activities.title: Generate slim 檔案-diff 於 end 的 回合
activities.description: 工作流程 runner queries git 供 additions/deletions/狀態 依 檔案. Never reads 檔案 bodies 進入 buffers. Writes slim 檔案diff[] 到 使用者 訊息 summary.diffs.

activities.title: 持久化 slim 訊息 記錄
activities.description: Existing 儲存.write 路徑 writes 訊息 info.js在. Because 在-memory shape has 無 before/after fields, 磁碟 representation 是 automatically slim.

activities.title: Serve Session reads (slim payload)
activities.description: HTTP 訊息 路由, SSE bus.訊息.updated, share export all 返回 slim shape unchanged 來自 磁碟. Clients 渲染 metadata-僅 views. 無 diff viewer 路徑 exists 伺服器-side.

activities.title: 伺服器-side owned-diff 透過 git
activities.description: Workspace owned-diff check calls git directly (git show against 訊息 snapshot commit) when it needs 到 compare 檔案 content 使用 worktree 狀態. 無 shared helper; inline 呼叫.

activities.title: Migrate historical Session (單次-回合)
activities.description: Maintenance script walks Session/ directory, rewrites each 訊息 info.js在 到 slim shape (移除 before/after), writes 依-Session marker. Atomic 依-檔案 (temp + rename). Idempotent (marker skips).

activities.title: UI renders metadata rows 僅
activities.description: Desktop review tab, shared Sessionreview component, enterprise share page — all 渲染 單次 row 依 changed 檔案: 路徑, additions, deletions, 狀態. 無 expand button, 無 diff content fetch.

arrows.label: 回合 boundary (end 的 助手 回應)
schema definition: 檔案diff has 無 before/after
Metadata rows rendered 到 使用者
Owned-diff 結果 (same semantics 作為 before)
Filesystem walk + atomic rename + structured logger
Slimmed Session records + audit 記錄
